s1-intro-text-1: As part of this project and a token of our appreciation we would like to present to the Warhorse team the physical award that was created by fans. Not as an industry prize but as something different. Something from the players themselves. A symbol that their work mattered so much to us. That it reached us.
s1-intro-text-2: We are not an official organization. We are not critics. We are not a jury. We are just players.
s1-intro-text-3: And sometimes the most meaningful recognition doesn't come from a stage. It comes from the community that lived inside the world your hard work and dedication built.
s1-intro-text-4: Games are more than entertainment. They are late nights, emotional moments, frustration, triumph, immersion and memories that stay for years. It started with a feeling many of us know well: finishing the game, sitting through the credits being absolutely stunned and wishing we could personally thank the people who made it.
s1-intro-text-5: Behind every game we enjoy are the people who put their heart and soul into something they sometimes never fully see reflected back to them. So we, a group of sincere and devoted fans of Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 from all around the world, would like to express our deepest thanks to the entire team of developers, designers, writers and all those who contributed to the creation of this game.
s1-intro-text-6: KCD2 wasn’t just another game. It was an experience. It was history brought to life and dedication to realism. A proof that games can be art, storytelling and craftsmanship at the same time. For many of us KCD2 has been truly life-changing: became a guiding light through difficult times, supported in coping with health challenges and personal struggles, gave us strength and inspiration to carry on and even helped to find new friends all around the world.
s1-intro-text-7: So we decided to create a space where the community can do something simple but powerful. Say thank you.
s1-intro-text-8: This website exists so fans can share their appreciation directly with the developers. Every message here is part of something bigger: a reminder that impact isn’t measured only in recognition but in the people who were moved and inspired by this game.
s2-text: With this long-standing slogan we want to say that regardless of anything we value this game for the way it truly touched our hearts. We deeply appreciate the inmense effort and love poured into its creation:
s2-text-bold: most thrilling story plot, challenging mechanics, easter eggs and humor, NPCs, animation and music, performances of the actors and the overall atmosphere.
s2-text-2: We cherished every moment of this remarkable game being fully aware of how much work was done for us. As fans from all corners of the world we value the dedication as KCD2 holds a special place in our hearts.
s5-title: Express your gratitude, leave a message to Warhorse team

s6-subtitle: While working on the design, our amazing design team carefully considered many different options and brainstormed various ideas. Many of the ideas were so good that we decided to mention them here. Please check out the creation process.
s6-d3: Shapping the symbol of fans love
